instruction: Someone repainted the yellow highlight ring on the face frown icon purple. Set it back to the original.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/face-frown.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.182 16.318A4.486 4.486 0 0 0 12.016 15a4.486 4.486 0 0 0-3.198 1.318M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0ZM9.75 9.75c0 .414-.168.75-.375.75S9 10.164 9 9.75 9.168 9 9.375 9s.375.336.375.75Zm-.375 0h.008v.015h-.008V9.75Zm5.625 0c0 .414-.168.75-.375.75s-.375-.336-.375-.75.168-.75.375-.75.375.336.375.75Zm-.375 0h.008v.015h-.008V9.75Z"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="#a855f7" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="heroicons/outline/face-frown.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" d="M15.182 16.318A4.486 4.486 0 0 0 12.016 15a4.486 4.486 0 0 0-3.198 1.318M21 12a9 9 0 1 1-18 0 9 9 0 0 1 18 0ZM9.75 9.75c0 .414-.168.75-.375.75S9 10.164 9 9.75 9.168 9 9.375 9s.375.336.375.75Zm-.375 0h.008v.015h-.008V9.75Zm5.625 0c0 .414-.168.75-.375.75s-.375-.336-.375-.75.168-.75.375-.75.375.336.375.75Zm-.375 0h.008v.015h-.008V9.75Z"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
